description: LionWeather ML full analysis: climate trends, EDA, ACF/PACF, FFT, spurious correlations, SHAP, loss curves, classification & regression benchmarks. Train 2016-2022 | Val 2023 | Test 2024.

stl_decomposition.note: Monthly rainfall totals (mm). STL period=12 months.

nea_benchmark.description: NEA 6h regional forecast vs actual 6h station observations (2024 holdout). overall.classN = per-region stacked (NEA has advantage: region-specific predictions). overall.classN.island_wide = FAIR comparison: both aggregated to island-wide majority vote per period.

class3.note: Per-region stacked: NEA regional forecasts vs regional actuals (NEA advantage — region-specific). ML applies same island-wide prediction to each of 5 regions.

class4.note: Per-region stacked: NEA regional forecasts vs regional actuals (NEA advantage — region-specific). ML applies same island-wide prediction to each of 5 regions.

nea_2h_benchmark.description: NEA 2h per-area forecast vs actual station rainfall (nearest station, ≤10 km). per_area_nea: NEA area-level accuracy (NEA's natural granularity — ML not compared here). island_wide: both aggregated to island-wide majority vote for fair ML vs NEA comparison. Test year: 2024.

per_area_nea.note: NEA 2h per-area forecast accuracy vs nearest station actual (47 areas).

per_area_ml.note: island-wide ML prediction applied to each of 47 areas

per_area_ensemble.note: ensemble 60% ML + 40% NEA applied per area

island_wide.note: Both NEA and actual aggregated to island-wide via majority vote across all 47 areas. Fair apples-to-apples comparison with ML island-wide prediction.

per_area_nea.note: NEA 2h per-area forecast accuracy vs nearest station actual (47 areas).

per_area_ml.note: island-wide ML prediction applied to each of 47 areas

per_area_ensemble.note: ensemble 60% ML + 40% NEA applied per area

island_wide.note: Both NEA and actual aggregated to island-wide via majority vote across all 47 areas. Fair apples-to-apples comparison with ML island-wide prediction.

classification_1h.error: only length-1 arrays can be converted to Python scalars
